products.title: Caran d'Ache Neoart 6901 Wax Pastels
products.body_html:
Unrivalled colour intensity and lightfastness.

NEOART 6901 is the first wax and oil pastel to conform standard ASTM D-6901, offering unrivalled colour intensity and exceptional lightfastness for up to 100 years. This permanent pastel combines the softness of wax with the richness of oil, creating a unique texture.

Like Luminance 6901 colour pencils, the lightfastness of NEOART 6901 has been tested in the Arizona desert. NEOART 6901 pastels guarantee remarkable colour purity and richness thanks to 75% mono- or bi-pigment formulas and no fewer than 44 pigments used.

With its high pigment concentration and octagonal shape for easy handling, NEOART 6901 is aimed at professionals, art students, and passionate creatives, offering a medium of unrivalled quality for creating nomadic, spontaneous and vibrant work that last over time.

products.title: Caran d'Ache Neoart 6901 - Set of 24
products.body_html:

The selection of 24 vibrant colours is ideal for creating floral motifs, still life and landscapes.

With its high pigment concentration and octagonal shape for easy handling, NEOART 6901 is aimed at professionals, art students, and passionate creatives, offering a medium of unrivalled quality for creating nomadic, spontaneous and vibrant work that last over time.
